array_types.name: Square_Layout

documentation.description: Each Character in Upper except 'J' must appear in a Square_Layout exactly once

subtypes.name: Square_Row
subtypes.code: subtype Square_Row is String (Index) with Dynamic_Predicate => Valid_Ciphertext (Square_Row);

documentation.description: Each Character in Upper except 'J' must appear in a Square_Layout exactly once

subprograms.name: Decrypt
subprograms.code: function Decrypt (Ciphertext : in String; Key : in Square_Layout) return String

subprograms.name: Encrypt
subprograms.code: function Encrypt (Plaintext : in String; Key : in Square_Layout) return String

documentation.description: Converts Plaintext to upper case, removes non-letters, and changes 'J' to 'I', then encrypts that with Key

subprograms.name: Valid_Ciphertext
subprograms.code: function Valid_Ciphertext (Source : in String) return Boolean
